task: Move the green block on top of the cabinet to the left
raw:
Scene: green_block, cabinet, table
Step 1: reach(green_block)
  affordance_region: the green block on top of the cabinet
  contact: gripper_state(open) [progress]
  spatial: distance(gripper, green_block, <, 0.03) [completion]
  direction: approach_axis(0, 0, -1) [progress]
  done_when: distance(gripper, green_block) < 0.03
Step 2: grasp(green_block)
  affordance_region: the green block on top of the cabinet
  contact: holding(green_block) [completion]
  direction: grasp_axis(0, 0, -1) [progress]
  done_when: holding(green_block)
Step 3: transport(green_block -> cabinet_left)
  affordance_region: an empty area on the cabinet left
  spatial: above(green_block, cabinet_left, 0.05) [completion]
  safety: no_drop(green_block)
  done_when: above(green_block, cabinet_left, 0.05)
Step 4: place(green_block -> cabinet_left)
  affordance_region: an empty area on the cabinet left
  contact: surface_contact(green_block, cabinet_left) [completion]; released(green_block) [completion]
  pose: stable(green_block) [completion]
  done_when: surface_contact(green_block, cabinet_left) AND released(green_block) AND stable(green_block)
<END_OF_PLAN>

steps.affordance_region: the green block on top of the cabinet
the green block on top of the cabinet
an empty area on the cabinet left
an empty area on the cabinet left
steps.done_when: surface_contact(green_block, cabinet_left) AND released(green_block) AND stable(green_block)
